Software Quality Assurance Graphic Designer

Kiran J

I break software before users do — and create visuals that don't break the eye.

Computer Science postgraduate from Puducherry with hands-on experience in software testing (Selenium, JUnit, TestNG) and graphic design (Adobe Photoshop & Illustrator). Two skills. One mindset: precision and creativity.

🧪 QA Engineer

I find what breaks before it reaches the user. From writing detailed test cases to automating test suites with Selenium — I make sure software is reliable, correct, and ready to ship.
